pages.text: Raw Meaty Stew is made by mixing most raw meats or fish, with Carrot, Potato, Brown Mushroom and $(l:herbology/garlic)Garlic$(/l) in a $(item)Bowl$(). The result must then be cooked in a Furnace or $(l:fumes/fumes)Witches' Oven$(/l).
While eating Raw Meaty Stew will still recover a minor amount of Hunger, cooking it will recover a significant amount of Hunger and Saturation.
